product_overview: SAR Workforce provides a superadmin console for managing tenant organizations across the platform. Superadmins can log in, create and configure tenants, and access platform-level views for apps, analytics, and personal settings.
core_goals: Log in as a superadmin and access the admin console
Create new tenant organizations with initial admin accounts and app provisioning
Configure tenant organization details and SMTP email settings
View platform-level tenant analytics and the apps catalog
Manage superadmin personal profile and security settings

features.name: Superadmin Login
features.description: Authenticate with superadmin credentials and enter the tenant management area.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See tenant management page

features.name: Create Tenant
features.description: Create a new tenant organization with selected applications and initial admin credentials.
user_flows: Navigate to /superadmin/tenants -> Open tenant creation flow -> Fill in organization name -> Select apps -> Fill in admin first name -> Fill in admin last name -> Fill in admin email -> Fill in admin password -> Submit tenant creation form -> See new tenant created with onboarding email sent
Navigate to /superadmin/tenants -> Open tenant creation flow -> Submit tenant creation form with required fields left blank -> See validation messages for missing details
Navigate to /superadmin/tenants -> Open tenant creation flow -> Fill in an email that is already registered -> Submit tenant creation form -> See duplicate email validation message

features.name: Tenant SMTP Mail Configuration
features.description: Configure a tenant's SMTP settings and verify outbound email setup.
user_flows: Navigate to /superadmin/tenants -> Open tenant settings for a tenant -> Switch to SMTP settings -> Fill in SMTP host -> Fill in SMTP port -> Select encryption -> Fill in username -> Fill in password -> Fill in from name -> Fill in from email -> Test the connection -> See successful SMTP connection feedback -> Send a test email -> Enter recipient email -> See test email sent successfully -> Save the settings

features.name: Tenant Directory Management
features.description: Review tenant listings and manage tenant access status from the tenants page.
user_flows: Navigate to /superadmin/tenants -> Review tenant summary widgets -> Browse the tenant directory table -> Search for a tenant by name, admin, or email -> See the table filtered to matching tenants
Navigate to /superadmin/tenants -> Open a tenant action menu -> Suspend the tenant -> Confirm the action -> See the tenant marked as suspended
Navigate to /superadmin/tenants -> Open a suspended tenant action menu -> Activate the tenant -> Confirm the action -> See the tenant marked as active

features.name: Tenant Impersonation
features.description: Temporarily switch into a tenant admin session for support and troubleshooting, then return to the superadmin session.
user_flows: Navigate to /superadmin/tenants -> Choose an active tenant -> Start impersonation -> See the impersonation banner -> Interact as the tenant admin
Navigate to /superadmin/tenants -> While impersonating a tenant -> Return to superadmin -> See the original superadmin session restored

features.name: Tenant Analytics
features.description: View aggregated platform analytics across tenants.
user_flows: Navigate to /superadmin/analytics -> See tenant growth and platform usage analytics

features.name: Apps Catalog
features.description: Browse the catalog of available platform modules and filter the displayed apps.
user_flows: Navigate to /superadmin/apps -> Review the app catalog cards -> See module status and details
Navigate to /superadmin/apps -> Choose an app status filter -> See the catalog update to matching apps

features.name: Superadmin Settings
features.description: Edit personal profile information and account security settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Open profile settings -> Update personal details -> Save changes -> See the updated profile information
Navigate to /settings -> Open security settings -> Change password -> Save changes -> See the password update confirmed

features.name: Superadmin Login
features.description: Login to superadmin account with email and password
user_interactions: Fill email input field with vishwaaniruddh@gmail.com
Fill password input field with rootroot

features.name: Create Tenant
features.description: Superadmin creates a new tenant organization
user_interactions: Fill Admin First Name, Last Name, Email, Password
Tenant is created and onboarding email is sent

features.name: Tenant SMTP Mail Configuration
features.description: Superadmin configures SMTP settings for a tenant
user_interactions: Click Settings (⚙) button on a tenant row
Fill SMTP Host, Port, Encryption, Username, Password, From Name, From Email
